headline: Entergy Shareholders Back Board as CEO Highlights Data Center Demand, Grid Investments
summary: Entergy (NYSE:ETR) shareholders elected the company’s director nominees, ratified Deloitte & Touche as its independent registered public accountant for 2026 and approved an advisory vote on named executive officer compensation at the utility’s 2026 annual meeting.
